nextSteps: Share the workflow, product, or system you want to build.
We clarify goals, constraints, current tools, and decision criteria.
Our team reviews architecture, integrations, data flow, and delivery risk.
You receive a clear scope, implementation plan, timeline, and investment range.
After approval and payment, onboarding begins and the delivery plan moves into execution.

about.text: Asman AI helps businesses build AI-powered software, automate operations, and launch scalable digital platforms.
about.brandLine: AI Automation - Software Development - SaaS Solutions
blocks: Transform manual operations into intelligent, scalable digital systems.
Become a trusted technology partner for businesses that need durable software infrastructure.
Map bottlenecks, design the architecture, build quickly, and support long-term adoption.
Premium execution, clear business thinking, modern software practices, and measurable automation outcomes.

sectionDetails.proofText: Premium AI automation, software development, and SaaS delivery.
sectionDetails.trustText: Enterprise buyers need more than polished screens. They need technical ownership, secure delivery, and systems that can keep evolving.

sectionDetails.osText: Automation, data, software, and reporting work together as one durable operating layer.

services.title: AI Automation
services.text: Automate customer support, sales follow-ups, internal tasks, and repetitive workflows with reliable AI systems.
services.proof: Designed to compress response time and reduce manual handoffs.

services.title: Software Development
services.text: Build secure web applications, CRM systems, dashboards, portals, and enterprise software.

services.title: SaaS Development
services.text: Launch subscription products with scalable architecture, analytics, admin tools, and billing flows.
services.proof: Built around activation, retention, billing, and operational visibility.

services.title: AI Voice Agents
services.text: Answer calls, qualify leads, book appointments, and support customers around the clock.
services.proof: Human-grade call flows with escalation logic.

services.title: CRM Automation
services.text: Connect forms, lead routing, sales tasks, follow-ups, and reporting into one operational system.
services.proof: Clean pipeline operations from lead capture to close.

services.title: Enterprise Solutions
services.text: Dedicated teams and robust architecture for larger operational systems and long-term product builds.
services.proof: Governed delivery for systems that become company infrastructure.

trustIndicators: Systems designed for complex business operations

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: For teams validating automation around one core workflow.

plans.name: Growth
plans.description: For companies replacing manual operations with connected software.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.description: For mission-critical software, multiple AI agents, and SaaS architecture.

industries: Lead qualification, CRM automation, and appointment booking for high-volume sales teams.
Dispatch automation, document workflows, and client communication systems.
Appointment automation, patient support, and internal workflow automation.
Customer support AI, order updates, marketing automation, and dashboards.
Reporting dashboards, workflow automation, and client onboarding systems.
Client intake, project operations, knowledge workflows, and executive reporting.

cases.challenge: Internal workflows and dispatch operations relied on manual coordination.
cases.solution: Automated internal workflows, routing logic, status updates, and operational dashboards.
cases.secondary: Dispatch coordination became faster and easier to monitor.

cases.challenge: Sales teams spent too much time qualifying and following up with leads manually.
cases.solution: Implemented AI-driven lead qualification, CRM automation, reminders, and appointment workflows.
cases.outcome: Improved sales efficiency and response times.
cases.secondary: Lead response became more consistent across the team.

cases.challenge: The product needed scalable architecture and internal automation to support growth.
cases.solution: Developed SaaS architecture, dashboards, automation systems, and cloud deployment workflows.
cases.outcome: Supported rapid growth and operational efficiency.
cases.secondary: The platform gained a cleaner foundation for product and operations teams.

operatingPrinciples: We map where decisions, handoffs, and customer response loops actually break down.
Every automation is designed as part of a durable software and data foundation.
CRM, billing, cloud, and AI integrations are structured with access control and auditability in mind.
Dashboards and KPIs are planned from the beginning so impact is visible after launch.
deliverySteps: Map workflows, bottlenecks, data sources, and measurable business goals.
Define the architecture, automation logic, interfaces, and rollout plan.
Build the product, AI agents, CRM automation, dashboards, and integrations.
Measure performance, improve adoption, and extend the system with support.

faqs: Projects begin with a clear scope, proposal, payment, onboarding materials, and access to required systems.
Can Asman AI work with our existing tools?
Yes. We can plan integrations with CRM, cloud, payment, communication, analytics, and internal business systems.
Pricing depends on scope, complexity, integrations, timeline, and support requirements. The Pricing page provides starting ranges.
Support can include monitoring, improvements, bug fixes, documentation, handoff, and future feature development.

legalHub.title: Terms & Policies
legalHub.text: Important legal information regarding Asman AI services, payments, delivery, privacy, refunds, and acceptable use.
legalHub.notice: Asman AI is a brand operated by ASMAN LLC. These policies should be read together with any accepted proposal, invoice, statement of work, or service agreement.
cards: Service terms covering requests, proposals, purchases, project agreements, and use of Asman AI services.
How submitted business and personal information is collected, used, stored, and protected.
Refund handling for custom digital services, consulting, software work, and project preparation.
Information about website cookies, analytics, functionality, and preference technologies.
Responsible-use standards for Asman AI systems, software, automation, and AI-enabled services.
Payment requirements, advance invoicing, project activation, third-party costs, and service fees.
Scope approval, delivery timelines, client responsibilities, revisions, delays, and suspension rules.
How cancellations are handled before work begins, after work starts, and during client-caused delays.
Ownership of final deliverables, reusable frameworks, methods, proprietary tools, and pre-existing assets.
